title: buf_resize_thread missing in performance_schema.threads
description:
The `buf_resize_thread` should be in the performance_schema.threads table.
How to repeat:
select thread_id,name,thread_os_id from performance_schema.threads;
Suggested fix:
A `pfs_register_thread()` call should be added in `fts_optimize_thread()`.

Here is the fix:
https://github.com/mysql/mysql-server/pull/350
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_threads (thread_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, thread_os_id INTEGER);
INSERT INTO test_threads (thread_id, name, thread_os_id) VALUES (1, 'main_thread', 12345);
INSERT INTO test_threads (thread_id, name, thread_os_id) VALUES (2, 'buf_resize_thread', NULL);
SELECT thread_id, name, COALESCE(thread_os_id, 'N/A') AS thread_os_id FROM test_threads WHERE thread_id > 0;
SELECT t1.thread_id, t1.name FROM test_threads t1 JOIN test_threads t2 ON t1.thread_id = t2.thread_id WHERE t2.name IS NOT NULL;
